The Problem
Growth teams are stuck between two bad options.
🏢
The agency model is broken.
You pay 3,000 to 10,000 per month for a report you can't interpret, can't act on, and can't learn from.
😨
Going in-house feels impossible.
GA4 is confusing. Ads attribution is broken post-iOS 14. GTM fires are untested.
🤝
What teams actually need.
A companion that watches your growth stack 24/7, flags what's wrong, and walks you through fixing it.
📍
The gap we fill.
No product today audits your full growth stack AND guides you through fixing it.

Why We Win
Six reasons this is a fundable, scalable, defensible business.
01
Untapped Companion Layer
Every growing team has a stack. No tool audits it and guides them through fixing it.
02
Founder-Market Fit
Ozlem and Dilara diagnosed growth stacks for 20+ EMEA startups before building this.
03
Right Market, Right Moment
Post-iOS 14.5, cookieless transitions, and GA4 migration chaos. Demand for clarity at an all-time high.
04
Freemium Growth Engine
Free tier creates a self-serve acquisition loop. Connect GA4, see Health Score, upgrade.
05
Defensible Data Moat
Every audit deepens our benchmark database. 100+ verticals. Impossible to replicate.
06
Built for EMEA, Ready to Scale
Incorporated in Spain and Turkey. GDPR-native. Direct path to UK, DACH and Nordics.

01 / 10
Cover
GrowthWise — Your Growth Champion.
AI-powered growth audit & strategy platform for SMEs and startups. Connect your channels, get actionable insights, and grow smarter.
02 / 10
The Problem
Growth is broken for most businesses.
Poor visibility in SEO and content. Black-box agencies with no accountability. Expensive consultants out of reach. More channels = more chaos, less clarity.
03 / 10
The Ambition
Make the growth engine accessible to every business.
Every SME deserves enterprise-grade growth intelligence. GrowthWise closes that gap with AI-powered audits and strategy at a fraction of the cost.
04 / 10
Market Reality
No engine, no growth.
25% of businesses have no digital marketing strategy. 91% say SEO is important — yet most can't act on it. Average agency spend: €3,000/month with unclear ROI.
05 / 10
Our Solution
Six pillars of growth intelligence.
Claude AI Growth Audits. Weekly Health Score (0–100). Full-Stack Connectors (GA4, GSC, Meta, TikTok). Sprint Planner. Anomaly Detection. Leaking Point Detection.
06 / 10
Target Market
Two high-value segments.
Tech startups & scale-ups seeking product-market fit. Service & Manufacturing SMEs (50–500 employees) ready to grow beyond referrals.
07 / 10
The Product
Live now — Phase 2 arriving Q3–Q4 2026.
LIVE: Claude AI Audits, Health Score, GA4 + GSC connectors, Sprint Planner. Coming Q3–Q4 2026: LinkedIn, Meta, TikTok connectors, Agent-optimised ad spend, White-label.
08 / 10
Product Roadmap
Clear phases. Measurable milestones.
Phase 1 (Live): Core audit engine, Health Score, GA4/GSC. Phase 2 (Q3–Q4 2026): Full channel suite — LinkedIn, Meta, TikTok, agent-optimised spend. Phase 3 (2027): Predictive AI, white-label platform.
09 / 10
Business Model
Flexible pricing. Clear value.
Starter: Free — core audit + health score. Growth: $299/mo — all connectors + sprint planner. Pro: $499/mo — anomaly detection + leaking point analysis. White-Label: Custom — agency partnerships.
10 / 10
Thank You
Let's build the growth engine together.
